name: QA 1483
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1483

look for bad syslog entries



Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora40-container reproduce

look for bad syslog entries

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)
17a18,27
> Oct 05 19:31:29 a37aa159630d rc[683727]: pmpost: cannot open or create file "/var/log/pcp/NOTICES": Permission denied
